code: module.exports = { actions: { async captureAll(api, input, state) { const photo = await api.camera.takePhoto(); const pos = await api.location.getCurrentPosition(); const photoUri = (photo && photo.uri) ? photo.uri : (state.photoUri || ''); const coords = pos ? ('Lat: ' + pos.latitude.toFixed(5) + '  Lon: ' + pos.longitude.toFixed(5)) : 'Posizione non disponibile'; return { photoUri, coords, savedMsg: '' }; }, async saveEntry(api, input, state) { if (!state.photoUri) { return { savedMsg: 'Scatta prima una foto.' }; } const entry = { photoUri: state.photoUri, coords: state.coords || '', note: state.note || '' }; await api.storage.save('foto_gps_' + Date.now(), entry); return { savedMsg: 'Voce salvata.' }; } } };
